title: Derby winner tops out at 42.05 pounds
summary: BOB HALLINEN / Anchorage Daily News more | enlarge Colten Palmer of Eagle River carries his 17.5-pound king salmon across the street from Ship Creek to the weigh-in station for the Downtown Soup Kitchen Slam'n Salm'n Derby on Sunday. Palmer was fishing with his dad on Father's Day when he pulled in the silvery lunker. The 11-day event ended at 3 p.m. Sunday.
